name: Crossmon

signature_move.name: Kaiser Phoenix
signature_move.description: Performs a ramming attack with its full metal body.

description: Current Original ⇨ Japanese A Giant Bird Digimon whose body is clad in gold armor. The armor that covers its whole body is made of Chrome Digizoid , so it deflects every attack. Also, Crossmon is even said to be an evolved form of the Perfect Digimon, Parrotmon . It is said that it is Crossmon's duty to annihilate the invaders that enter the Digital World. Its Special Moves are performing a ramming attack with its full metal body ( Kaiser Phoenix ), and a white ray which reduces the opponent to ash ( Mystic Break ). Crossmon was adopted from a winning Digimon entry in the " Digimon Web Dot-art Contest " which belonged to Mr. Shun Nabetou from Fukuoka prefecture .
